data.title: Bitfarms Q3 revenue drops to $69.3 million, misses expectations by ~20%
data.description:
Bitfarms just posted its latest earnings report for Q3 2025, and the results were straight-up disappointing. The company reported $69. 25 million in revenue for the quarter ending September, falling about 16. 7% short of what analysts at Zacks were expecting. That’s a big miss for a company that’s been riding high this year in terms of […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitfarms-q3-revenue-misses/

data.title: A wallet sold $268,700 worth of URANUS tokens, representing 1.08% of the total market capitalization.
data.description: Stalkchain, an on-chain monitoring platform, reported on its X platform that a wallet is quietly selling $268,700 worth of URANUS, at a rate of approximately $860 per minute. This represents about 1.08% of the total market capitalization. Such sustained selling pressure could rapidly alter the token's price trajectory if liquidity is insufficient.

data.title: Tokenization Platform Libeara Partners With GFX to Drive Pan-African Financial Inclusion
data.description:
Ghana-based brokerage firm GFX has entered into a strategic partnership with Libeara, a regulated tokenization platform backed by Standard Chartered Ventures, to explore the tokenisation of government-issued financial instruments and expand access to high-quality investments across Africa.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/tokenization-platform-libeara-partners-with-gfx-to-drive-pan-african-financial-inclusion/

data.title: Luno and Discovery Bank Launch Landmark Crypto Integration for Over 1 Million South Africans
data.description:
Discovery Bank and Luno have launched South Africa’s first native crypto-banking integration, enabling more than 1M customers to buy, hold, and sell digital assets.

The post Luno and Discovery Bank Launch Landmark Crypto Integration for Over 1 Million South Africans first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/11/13/luno-discovery-bank-launch-crypto-app/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=luno-discovery-bank-launch-crypto-app

data.title: Elon Musk Denies xAI Funding Claims
data.description: According to Odaily, Elon Musk has refuted claims regarding the financing of his artificial intelligence company, xAI. Market reports had suggested that xAI raised $15 billion in a Series E funding round, as disclosed by CNBC. However, Musk has stated that these reports are inaccurate.

data.title: Bitcoin to Surpass Gold by 2035, Says Saylor — Here Is Why He’s Not Backing Down
data.description:
"According to prominent cryptocurrency advocate Michael Saylor, Bitcoin is poised to surpass gold in value and market dominance by the year 2035. Saylor, who has been a vocal proponent of Bitcoin and its potential as a digital asset, outlines several compelling reasons for his unwavering confidence in this prediction. He believes that the unique properties of Bitcoin, such as its limited supply, decentralized nature, and increasing adoption as a store of value, will ultimately allow it to outshine traditional safe-haven assets like gold. Furthermore, Saylor discusses the evolving landscape of finance and investment, highlighting the growing institutional interest in Bitcoin and the technological advancements that continue to enhance its utility. As he stands firm in his conviction, Saylor encourages both investors and skeptics alike to consider the long-term implications of this digital revolution."
source: https://blocknews.com/bitcoin-to-surpass-gold-2035-says-saylor-here-is-why-hes-not-backing-down/

data.title: Stable: Mainnet Coming Soon
data.description: Stable stated in a post on the X platform, "In the Stable network, USDT will serve as the native gas token to ensure transaction fees remain predictable under any network conditions, thereby eliminating volatility in the payment process. This design choice lays the foundation for reliable settlement and everyday payments. The mainnet is launching soon."
